title: Netify Network Interfaces Telemetry
description: JSON Schema for Netify Agent v5 network interfaces telemetry.

additionalProperties.description: Per-interface object keyed by interface name.

interfaceAttributes.description: Attributes for a single monitored network interface.

addr.description: List of IP addresses assigned to the interface.

capture_type.description: Capture type in use for the interface.

role.description: Assigned network role for the interface.
